market_pulse: Competitive activity remains strong mid-week with multi-venue DJ lineups and heavy social engagement; LIV maintains strong presence with upcoming Kehlani/Gorgon City/FourColorZack weekend.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, OMNIA, Zouk) posting more frequent BTS/preparation content; LIV appears less frequent in daily stories.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase daily Instagram/TikTok story cadence with pool setup, talent prep, and venue transformation content.

content_gaps.description: Competitors actively resharing guest posts and fan videos; LIV reposts appear less frequent.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch hashtag campaign #LIVLasVegasMoment and curate top UGC posts for daily stories and feed.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using trending TikTok sounds for performance clips; LIV content uses original audio mostly.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Sync 3-5 talent clips with trending TikTok sounds weekly for algorithmic boost.
